violations.claim: PROVEN: Line 499 logs a static string — no field dereference, unconditionally safe.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 499
; PROVEN: Line 499 logs a static string — no field dereference, unconditionally safe.
; Reaching line 499 proves lines 495-498 completed without throwing.
(declare-const lines_495_to_498_threw Int)  ; 1 = some prior line threw an exception
(declare-const line_499_executes Int)       ; 1 = closing separator is printed
; Code transition: line 499 executes only if no exception was raised on lines 495-498
(assert (=> (= lines_495_to_498_threw 0) (= line_499_executes 1)))
; Negated property: line 499 executes even though a prior line threw
(assert (= lines_495_to_498_threw 1))
(assert (= line_499_executes 1))
(check-sat)
